title: No Chiseled Faces
description: A cleaner design for players who don't like being stared at. Removes the faces from Chiseled Sandstone, Chiseled Polished Blackstone, and Chiseled Nether Bricks.
body:
![3 blocks affected by No Chiseled Faces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99dc63e902a9d8700de8ebdc21948826fed80914.png)

**Re-designs the faces of 3 different chiseled blocks.**

A new design for players who don't like being stared at! This pack is meant to look vanilla updating the chiseled blocks with a less intrusive look. Perfect for builders who want a more polished aesthetic without sacrificing Minecraft’s classic feel.

- **Chiseled Sandstone**: Inspired by the design found on desert temples 
- **Chiseled Polished Blackstone**: Inspired by emeralds and gold, a smooth round circle 
- **Chiseled Nether Bricks**: A central square that blends with brick textures
  
Compatibility:

- Made for Java Edition
- Made for 1.21.6+, but should work on older versions too
- Compatible with most packs as long as they don’t alter the same ​block textures
